title: Language change - Case Update Needed popup is not present after Language Change
scenario: "Case Update Needed" popup incorrectly triggers or fails to appear after changing app language in Device Settings on Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., earbuds) is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings by tapping on the connected device name.
5. Change the app language to a different language (e.g., from English to Spanish).
6. Exit Device Settings and return to the Home screen.
7. Trigger a software/firmware update check by navigating to Settings > Software Update (or equivalent path).
8. Observe whether the 'Case Update Needed' popup or card is displayed.
expected: The 'Case Update Needed' popup/card should NOT appear after a language change alone. It should only appear after a firmware DFU (Device Firmware Update) for the earbuds is required or triggered via Settings > Software Update.
